data.description: COSTA RICA CAPTURES FUGITIVE ALEJANDRO ARIAS DELGADO, KNOWN AS "DIABLO," WANTED BY U.S. ON DRUG CHARGES, AUTHORITIES SAY
Google signs EU AI act code of practice on transparency. $GOOGL
Omani diplomatic delegation traveled to Tehran to discuss mechanisms related to the Strait of Hormuz - IRNA.
A bridge in the Hungarian capital Budapest was closed after low water levels in the Danube exposed a German WWII shell. Bomb disposal experts safely removed the device.

UK's PM Burnham held talks with business groups - PM Office.

data.title: AerSale® Announces Date for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Conference Call
data.description: In Miami on July 24, 2026, AerSale Corporation (NASDAQ: ASLE) revealed plans to unveil its second-quarter earnings report for the period ending June 30, 2026, on Thursday, August 6, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call is scheduled for 4:30 pm Eastern Time on the release day to review the results.

data.title: TechForce Robotics Launches Proprietary Robotic Connective Network for Multi-Robot Coordination
data.description: Cutting-edge technology has been created to facilitate communication and coordination among robots, AI systems, sensors, and operational software in connected enterprise settings. This advancement allows for autonomous workflows to seamlessly unfold, promoting efficiency and productivity. This innovative technology is transforming various industries and has shown a significant increase in productivity rates by up to 30% in some cases. With the ability to streamline processes and enhance communication between different systems, this technology is paving the way for the future of automation and interconnected workflows in enterprise environments.

data.title: Cradles to Crayons Transforms Its Corporate Donor Pipeline with ZoomInfo
data.description: In Vancouver, Washington, ZoomInfo (NASDAQ: GTM), a comprehensive AI GTM platform, recently announced that Cradles to Crayons, a nonprofit aimed at offering clothing and essential items to underprivileged children, has revitalized its corporate fundraising efforts through the utilization of confirmed company and contact information. By incorporating ZoomInfo into its operations for the first time, Cradles to Crayons was able to reach a larger audience than ever before within the organization's history. This initiative allowed Cradles to Crayons to provide clothing, shoes, and daily essential items to a greater number of children in need.

data.title: EndoQuest Robotics Announces Completion of Enrollment in the PARADIGM Trial
data.description: EndoQuest Robotics, Inc., a frontrunner in endoluminal robotic surgical technology, has completed enrollment in its crucial multicenter investigational device exemption (IDE) clinical study, the PARADIGM Trial. The trial involved 50 robotic endoscopic submucosal dissection (ESD) procedures conducted on 49 subjects. The preliminary results of this study are promising.

data.title: Rubico Inc. Announces Letter of Intent for Acquisition of a High Specification Newbuilding MR Tanker
data.description: Rubico Inc., a prominent shipping transportation services provider listed on Nasdaq as RUBI, recently disclosed its plans to acquire a shipowning company through a letter of intent. This acquisition involves the transfer of a high-specification MR chemical/product oil tanker, being constructed by Guangzhou Shipyard International Company Limited and set for delivery in Q2 of 2029. Additionally, the shipowning company has secured a time charter agreement with Trafigura Maritime Logistics Pte. Ltd. spanning over 7 years at a daily rate of $18,750. Notably, an agreement with a Chinese Lessor covers 85% of the shipbuilding cost without necessitating any asset cover during the charter period.

data.title: BTC drops below $64K amid rising US bond yields, increasing chances of a Fed rate hike. Binance intervenes to prevent a further price decline.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin experienced multiple declines below the $64,000 level as a team from Binance known as the "plunge protection team" intervened by providing bid liquidity to prevent a more significant drop in the BTC price.

data.title: Truth Initiative Brings National, Award-Winning Behavior-Change Expertise to Ohio Cannabis Education Efforts
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Truth Initiative revealed its collaboration with OneOhio Recovery Foundation to enhance statewide cannabis education and prevention initiatives. As a result of this partnership, Truth Initiative will apply its acclaimed behavior change strategies on a national scale to support OneOhio's efforts. This program aims to address the growing concerns surrounding cannabis use and provide valuable resources to the population.

data.title: How Arena Covered Its Entire ZoomInfo Contract Cost in the First Month
data.description: In Vancouver, ZoomInfo (NASDAQ: GTM) announced that Arena, an online community-building communication platform, achieved significant business success within its initial month on the platform. According to sources, Arena, established in 2017, managed to generate sufficient business to cover the complete expense of its contract. Arena facilitates companies of all scales in connecting with their users utilizing group discussions and direct messaging. Its clientele spans from newly established startups to established businesses.

data.title: demandDrive Turned Website Visitors Into Millions in Recurring Revenue With ZoomInfo
data.description: Vancouver-based ZoomInfo (NASDAQ: GTM) recently shared that demandDrive, a sales development and demand generation firm, credits a substantial increase in annual recurring revenue to its enhanced buyer identification and prioritization methods. The company assists mid-market clients in the business services sector by managing prospecting, outbound, and lead generation initiatives on their behalf. Thanks to these strategies, demandDrive has successfully secured millions of dollars in yearly revenue for its clients.

data.title: Sovol Introduces M1D, Combining Multi-Color, Multi-Material Printing and Dual-Extruder Productivity in an Open-Source Platform
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Sovol, a leading company in collaborative 3D printing technology, unveiled its latest flagship M1D 3D printer worldwide. The cutting-edge printer boasts a build volume of 300x300x350mm and introduces the revolutionary DualX System. This innovative printer sets a new standard with its groundbreaking 7-color printing capability.

data.title: Five Ways to Get the Most from a GLP-1 Medication
data.description: Kroger Health dietitians are offering useful advice to patients managing weight as part of Kroger's GLP-1 Complete Support Program. This program, launched in Cincinnati on July 24, 2026, aims to provide comprehensive support to individuals exploring weight-management treatment options. GLP-1 medications have been instrumental in transforming possibilities for numerous patients seeking to regulate their weight.

data.title: Network Detection and Response (NDR) Market worth $7.29 billion by 2031 - Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of July 24, 2026, research from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the Network Detection and Response (NDR) Market is set to increase from USD 4.34 billion in 2026 to USD 7.29 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.9% expected during the forecast period.

data.title: SHIPLEY DONUTS' DONUT DASH RETURNS THIS FALL TO FIGHT CHILDHOOD HUNGER
data.description: Iconic donut chain in Texas has joined forces with Kids' Meals for an event featuring 10K and 5K races as well as kids' races in Houston on October 17. Registration is now available for Shipley Donuts' Donut Dash, set to take place at Sam Houston Race Park on the mentioned date. The event promises to be family-friendly, with various races catering to different age groups and abilities.

data.title: Nordstrom Rack to Open New Location in Victor, New York
data.description: A fashion retailer headquartered in Seattle, Nordstrom, Inc., disclosed intentions to launch a fresh Nordstrom Rack store in Victor, New York, come spring 2027. The company expressed excitement in joining the Victor community and showcasing an impressive selection of products.
